text:
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published in the Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society in 1945, not 1949. The cited author "C Radhakrishna Rao" is a standard and correct way to refer to the author "C. R. Rao".

LINK: https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/mathematical-proceedings-of-the-cambridge-philosophical-society/article/information-and-accuracy-attainable-in-the-estimation-of-statistical-parameters/A36C2755D6C7E2E0A47B49B611F31F90
FOUND_TITLE: Information and accuracy attainable in the estimation of statistical parameters
FOUND_AUTHORS: C. Radhakrishna Rao
FOUND_YEAR: 1945
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
